projectDescription: Rose is an open-source, automatic skin changer for League of Legends that seamlessly unlocks all skins via client-side asset injection without affecting gameplay.
keyFeatures: Automatic skin injection via LCU API integration and Pengu Loader plugins
Full chroma variant selection with a custom ChromaWheel UI overlay
Party mode for real-time skin sharing between friends in the same lobby
Historic mode and random skin selection
Client customization (Jade): regalia borders, banners, icons, and win/loss stats
Smart injection that skips skins you already own
Auto-updater with progress dialog for seamless version upgrades
Encrypted skin files downloaded at runtime and wiped after use
publicApiSurface: run_launcher(dev_mode, test_download_fail) — Win32 startup dialog and update/sync sequence (launcher/core/launcher.py)
ChromaSelector.show_button_for_skin(skin_id, skin_name, champion_name, champion_id) — chroma wheel display (ui/chroma/selector.py)
WebSocketServer(host, port, message_handler, http_handler) — Pengu plugin bridge (pengu/core/websocket_server.py)
LCUAPI.put(path, json_data, timeout, headers) — LCU HTTP PUT (lcu/core/lcu_api.py)
LCUAPI.patch(path, json_data, timeout) — LCU HTTP PATCH (lcu/core/lcu_api.py)
ROSE-UI plugin — unlocks skin previews in champion select
ROSE-SkinMonitor plugin — detects hovered skin and sends to backend
ROSE-PartyMode plugin — lobby/champion select party panel
